tasks.name: audit-host-wave1
tasks.scopedGoal: Audit wave-1 host/stdlib done issues listed in `.orchestrate/audit-slice-d/batches/wave1-host-stdlib.txt`. Contract: `prompts/research.md`. Cross-check each issue acceptance against repo evidence: `std/manifest.toml` availability claims, `src/compiler/wasm/call_host_io.ark` + `intrinsic_*.ark` dispatch, `tests/fixtures/stdlib_*` + `tests/fixtures/manifest.txt` registration. Reopen only confirmed `must-reopen` (repo proof contradicts done acceptance). For each reopen: git mv to `issues/open/`, set Status open, add `Reopened by audit` with evidence paths, roll back unchecked acceptance items. Run `python3 scripts/gen/generate-issue-index.py`. Append Slice D wave section to `docs/process/false-done-audit-2026-06-12.md`. Commit orchestration-state only (issues/**, docs/process/false-done-audit-2026-06-12.md, generated indexes). Run `python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick`. Do not modify `src/**` or `playground/**`.
acceptance: Audit report Slice D section appended
tasks.verify: python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick exits 0 or documents pre-existing failures only
